_comment: Walkie config template. The installer copies this to ~/.walkie/config.json and fills it in. You own that file; it is never mirrored back into the repo. Remove the _* comment fields if you like; the loader ignores unknown keys. Paths accept a leading ~ for your home directory.
_transport: Phone on-ramp transport. 'local' (default) = a self-contained WS+REST bus on THIS Mac — no hosted relay, no rk_live_ key needed, fully self-host. 'agent-relay' = the original hosted Agent Relay path (needs workspaceKey below). Keep 'local' unless you specifically want the hosted relay.
_workspaceKey: rk_live_… — your AgentRelay room key. ONLY needed when transport is 'agent-relay'. With the default 'local' transport you can leave this null.
_brokerApiKey: br_… — the key your phone presents to the local broker. Any string starting with br_. Per-user is fine; the default works.
_brokerBind: Bind address for the broker. 0.0.0.0 lets your phone reach it over Tailscale.
_brokerPort: Port the broker serves /ws and /api/send on.
_brokerStateDir: Where the broker keeps its state. Outside any git repo so a sync can't wipe it.
_sandboxDir: Where the builders work, and nowhere else. The wizard auto-creates a local scratch git repo here (~/walkie-scratch) so your first walk works with no GitHub account. Builds land as branches you read on the Mac.
_sandboxRepo: OPTIONAL. owner/repo — YOUR practice repo on GitHub. Leave null and builds stay in the local scratch project. Set it to turn on the 'open a PR you review on your phone' path. e.g. myuser/my-sandbox-repo.
_galleryDir: Where published web demos are staged. Out-of-repo so a sync can't wipe it.
_factoryRoot: Optional. A monorepo/portfolio root so the EM can see your projects. null = no factory context.
_stateDir: Root for logs, cost meter, team memory.
_directorName: What the EM calls you on the voice line.
_anthropicModel: Model the EM (talkers) run on. Sonnet is fast enough for a live phone call.
_anthropicApiKey: sk-ant-… — a metered API key for the EM, NOT a login. Runs the conversation for pennies. The builders use your claude CLI login (free), not this key. Leave null only if you set it via WALKIE_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.
_jailProfile: OFF by default. Builders run on your own Mac using your Claude subscription login, so builds are free and work on the first try. Setting this true turns on a sandbox-exec jail that walls each build off from your secrets (~/.ssh, ~/.aws, ~/.secrets, keychains) — but the jail also blocks the subscription login, so with it ON you MUST supply a metered anthropicApiKey above. Hardened opt-in; leave false unless you want the fence.
_transcripts: Your OWN walk transcripts, saved on YOUR Mac (~/.walkie/transcripts/, one JSONL per day: the voice line + the team room, raw build output skipped). Local only, never leaves the machine. false = a walk stays a call and nothing is kept.
_demoHost: OPTIONAL. Public host that serves shipped web demos at https://<demoHost>/<slug>/. null = local-only: demos are saved to galleryDir and reported as a local path, no live link. Only set this if YOU run a public gallery server.
_galleryHost: OPTIONAL. Public host for the gallery wall. null = local-only. Pairs with demoHost.
